Stickerbook Safari

PurrTrail

Private cat stickerbook

Save the cats you meet as cozy local field notes. PurrTrail keeps your trail private, works offline, and turns gentle observations into a playful stickerbook.

Get support Read privacy policy
Local-first

Works as a private field journal

Encounters, collection progress, streaks, and local media previews stay on device in V1.

Privacy-safe

Exact places stay tucked away

Share previews use approximate area language or hide the place entirely.

Humane

Observe from a comfortable distance

PurrTrail is for remembering cat encounters, not mapping or bothering animals.

About PurrTrail

PurrTrail is a cozy cat spotting journal for the cats you meet on real walks.

No account required. No advertising SDK. No analytics SDK. No public real-time map.

PurrTrail is local-first in V1: no account, no ads SDK, no analytics SDK, and no server sync.

Contact support · Privacy policy
